description: Perform a regulatory audit trail preservation workflow for a medical device session. Conduct a clinical session in OpenICE using a 'Multiparameter Monitor' and an 'Infusion Pump' for at least 15 seconds. Document this session in a secure audit directory at /home/ga/Desktop/QA_Audit_2026. This directory must include: a copy of the session log (from /home/ga/openice/logs/) named 'device_session_audit.log', a SHA-256 checksum of that log named 'integrity_hash.sha256', and a text file named 'audit_manifest.txt' containing the session date, time, and the device types used.
